title: SOLA-Stafette — Strecken (source: asvz.ch/event/643-strecken)
summary: SOLA-Stafette — Strecken (source: asvz.ch/event/643-strecken) # Fetched: 2026-04-29 # URL: https://asvz.ch/event/643-strecken # IMMUTABLE SOURCE — do not edit ## Overview - Total: 113km, 2600hm - 14 legs, starting at Bucheggplatz, finishing at Irchel (Sport Center) - SOLA-Map & GPX: https://trackmaxx.ch/maps/?m=ec368d93-aff4-4a7e-b0a5-24b7f9683a32&view=teilnehmende ## Route marking - Official markings: yellow jalons with ASVZ logo, sawdust, marking tape, small fanions - Strecken 3 and 6 are marked with RED jalons (due to crossing issues) - Ascending km signs mark distance covered on each leg - Leaving the marked route is not permitted --- ## Strecke 1 — 3.63km / 65hm / Start: Bucheggplatz - Start: Grillstelle Käferberg, 8037 Zürich (47.399583, 8.529667) - Timing: 07:30 Gruppe L (slow, bib 1–615); 08:00 Gruppe S (fast, bib 616–1111) - Character: Easy — short leg, little elevation, exclusively natural forest roads - Suitable for wheelchair users - No changing rooms or showers at start - Clothing transport: Bucheggplatz → Hönggerberg 07:00–08:05 --- ## Strecke 2 — 13.67km / 160hm / Übergabe: Hönggerberg - Start: Robert-Gnehm-Platz 1, 8093 Zürich (47.40695, 8.51074) - Timing: 07:40–08:35 expected - Character: Demanding — long leg, lots of ascent and descent; mix of natural roads, city passages on tarmac, forest and open terrain - Zeitneutralisation on Zürcherstrasse : timer pauses on entry of marked zone, resumes on exit (traffic safety measure) - No access from outside; no spectators allowed at handover - Strict no-parking on ETH grounds; parking only in ETH underground garage HIL - Clothing transport: Hönggerberg → Buchlern 07:00–08:20 - Changing rooms/showers: Sport Center Hönggerberg - Catering: SV Boxenstop stand (paid), 07:30–14:30, in front of Sport Center --- ## Strecke 3 — 5.88km / 413hm / Übergabe: Buchlern - Start: Friedhofstrasse 89, 8048 Zürich (47.38083, 8.47716) - Timing: 08:35–10:00 expected - Character: Demanding — short leg with lots of ascent; almost exclusively natural roads mostly in forest; some narrow passages with steep stairs - RED jalons (yellow jalons visible belong to Strecke 5 — ignore) - No clothing transport Buchlern → Uetliberg (suggestion: Läufer:in 4 takes bag from Läufer:in 3) - Changing rooms/showers: Sportanlage Buchlern - Medical: in changing room building, Sanitätszimmer - Catering: restaurant in changing room building (open Sat from 07:30) --- ## Strecke 4 — 5.88km / 122hm / Übergabe: Uetliberg - Start: Gratstrasse 1, 8143 Uetliberg (47.35144, 8.49045) - Timing: 09:10–10:50 expected - Character: Easy — flat leg, stunning views; exclusively natural roads; alternating forest and open terrain - No clothing transport Uetliberg → Felsenegg - No changing rooms or showers - Absolute no-driving zone in Uetliberg area (Waldegg-Ringlikon onwards) --- ## Strecke 5 — 13.92km / 288hm / Übergabe: Felsenegg - Start: Felsenegg 1, 8143 Stallikon (47.30842, 8.50839) - Timing: 09:40–11:50 expected - Character: Very demanding — long leg, lots of ascent and descent in narrow passages; mix of natural roads, tarmac, forest and open terrain - Yellow jalons (red jalons visible belong to Strecke 3 — ignore) - Access: Shuttle bus from Bahnhof Adliswil (Bus Kante B) every 20min 08:00–12:00 (~30min incl. walk). No private car access.

- Small mass start at ~10:40 for unrelayed runners - No changing rooms or showers on Felsenegg - Catering: Bergrestaurant Felsenegg (open from 08:30) --- ## Strecke 6 — 10.4km / 234hm / Übergabe: Buchlern - Start: Friedhofstrasse 89, 8048 Zürich (47.38083, 8.47716) — same address as Strecke 3 - Timing: 10:30–12:55 expected - Character: Demanding — long leg with lots of ascent and descent; mix of natural roads and city passages on tarmac; almost exclusively in open terrain - RED jalons (yellow jalons visible belong to Strecke 2 — ignore) - Zeitneutralisation on Zürcherstrasse : timer pauses on entry of marked zone, resumes on exit (traffic safety measure).
